name: Abatement of Second Tier Taxes via Correction

eligibility.description: Taxpayers facing severe second-tier penalties for prohibited transactions or failures to distribute income can eliminate the liability by fully 'correcting' the transaction within the correction period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Second tier excise taxes (often 100% or higher) are automatically abated, credited, or refunded if the underlying taxable event is corrected within the specified correction period.
